description: Tauri v2 native desktop app wrapping hex-hub-core. Provides system tray, native notifications, and embedded Axum server without requiring a separate hub process.

tasks.name: Verify Tauri build pipeline
tasks.description: Ensure 'cargo tauri build' and 'cargo tauri dev' work. Fix any missing tauri-build config, icon generation, or CSP issues. Verify hex-hub-core compiles as a dependency.

tasks.name: Embedded Axum server startup
tasks.description: On app launch, start hex-hub-core's Axum server on localhost:5555 inside the Tauri process. The main webview loads http://127.0.0.1:5555. Verify dashboard HTML renders correctly.

tasks.name: Hub status command
tasks.description: Tauri command: get_hub_status() returns JSON with server port, uptime, active agents, swarm status. Called from tauri-bridge.js.

tasks.name: Project open/switch command
tasks.description: Tauri command: open_project(path) uses tauri-plugin-dialog for folder picker. Updates hex-hub-core's project root. Persists recent projects list.

tasks.name: Agent spawn/kill commands
tasks.description: Tauri commands: spawn_agent(definition, project_path) and kill_agent(agent_id). Delegates to hex-hub-core orchestration layer. Returns agent status.

tasks.name: System tray with status indicator
tasks.description: Tray icon showing hub status (green=running, yellow=agents active, red=error). Menu items: Show Dashboard, Start/Stop Hub, Quit. Uses tauri tray-icon feature.

tasks.name: Native notifications for agent events
tasks.description: Push native OS notifications when: agent completes task, workplan phase finishes, agent fails/crashes. Uses tauri-plugin-notification. Configurable in settings.

tasks.name: Window state persistence
tasks.description: Remember window size/position across launches using tauri-plugin-window-state. Already declared as dependency — verify it works.

tasks.name: Chat panel with Tauri IPC
tasks.description: Enhance chat.html to use Tauri IPC bridge for native file-drop, clipboard paste, and system prompts. Fall back to pure WS when running in browser mode.

tasks.name: Project switcher sidebar
tasks.description: Add a sidebar to index.html listing recent projects (persisted via Tauri). Click to switch active project. Show per-project agent count and health.

tasks.name: Integration tests for Tauri commands
tasks.description: Test all Tauri commands with mock hex-hub-core state. Verify IPC serialization, error handling, and state updates.

tasks.name: macOS app bundle
tasks.description: Configure tauri.conf.json for macOS .app and .dmg output. Set app icon, bundle identifier, signing config (optional). Verify 'cargo tauri build' produces working .app.

parallel_opportunities: D2.1, D2.2, D2.3 can all run in parallel (independent commands)
D3 and D4 can run in parallel (tray vs frontend, independent)
D3.3 is independent and can run as soon as D1.1 is done
